title: ZXBrick

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZXSnake, ZXBrick and ZXSpace

shortDescription: Break bricks, collect power-ups, master 100 handcrafted levels, and chase your highest score.
description: ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), combining classic brick-breaking gameplay with modern mobile features. Smash through 100 handcrafted levels, collect powerful upgrades, unlock cosmetic themes, earn BarkinMad Coins, complete achievements, and compete for the highest scores.
features: BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic rewards

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) while playing the ZX Series and unlock cosmetic rewards across supported games. Coins have no cash value and are earned entirely through gameplay.

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), sharing achievements, BarkinMad Coins, and connected progression with games including [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong).

faq.question: How many levels does ZXBrick include?
faq.answer: ZXBrick features 100 handcrafted levels, each designed to provide a rewarding mix of challenge, progression, and replayability.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick support BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. BarkinMad Coins are earned through gameplay and stored in a shared wallet, allowing you to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.

summary: ZXBrick is a fast-paced brick-breaking arcade game featuring 100 handcrafted levels, power-ups, unlockable themes, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
